title: Autonomy Phase 0: Define WakeReason, RuntimeSignal, FollowUpPolicy contracts
description:
## Source
`Data/Pages/Tasks/memorysmith_llm_autonomy_design_2026-06-29.md`

## Scope
Define the vocabulary before touching runtime behavior: `WakeReason`, `RuntimeSignal`, `FollowUpPolicy`. Update architecture docs and AGENTS.md with the new autonomy model.

## Deliverables
- `WakeReason` enum (Chat, Timer, GoalCompleted, ActionCompleted, Recovery, Manual)
- `RuntimeSignal` type
- `FollowUpPolicy` (None, OnGoalComplete, OnActionComplete, OnTimer, OnFailure, ChainNextSteps)
- Update `architecture.md`
- Update AGENTS/task docs with autonomy model
- Confirm naming and lifecycle rules

## Exit criteria
- Team agrees on what a wake is
- Team agrees on what can trigger it
- Team agrees on suppression rules

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council review update (2026-06-29): This task is now gated by the `EvaluationResult` expansion (TSK-0243) and `FollowUpPolicy vs TaskSequenceGoal` contract (TSK-0247). Both are prerequisites for Phase 0 completion.

Additional deliverables from council:
1. `EvaluationResult` expansion (discriminated union, not bool+strings) — moved to TSK-0243
2. `FollowUpPolicy` vs `TaskSequenceGoal` interaction documented — moved to TSK-0247
3. Architecture.md and AGENTS.md updates remain in this scope
4. WakeReason enum should include `ExternalCommand` and `StateChange` (8 values, not 6)

See full report: `Data/Pages/council/blueprint-yaml-autonomy-council-2026-06-29.md`
